LanguageData.AcidSpray.label: formicula
LanguageData.Aggression_Aggressive.label: slayer
LanguageData.Aggression_DeadCalm.label: aurelian
LanguageData.Aggression_HyperAggressive.label: berserker
LanguageData.AnimalWarcall.label: animal friend
LanguageData.ArchiteMetabolism.label: synthetic metabolism
LanguageData.Beauty_Beautiful.label: cherchez la femme
LanguageData.Beauty_Pretty.label: black widow
LanguageData.Beauty_Ugly.label: mutant
LanguageData.Beauty_VeryUgly.label: abomination
LanguageData.CaveDweller.label: bunker blues
LanguageData.DarkVision.label: night stalker
LanguageData.Deathrest.description: Carriers of this gene suffer from Wendigo Sickness, often called "The Shakes" or "Wendigo Shakes"â€”a vitamin deficiency caused by exclusive cannibalism. This condition causes the gums to withdraw, leaving the appearance of long, fang-like teeth. Afflicted individuals frequently experience catatonic muscle shakes, giving the syndrome its name.
LanguageData.Deathrest.label: "The Shakes"
LanguageData.Delicate.label: small frame
LanguageData.DiseaseFree.label: sterile
LanguageData.Fertile.label: life giver
LanguageData.FireResistant.label: pyromaniac
LanguageData.FireSpew.label: gojira
LanguageData.FireTerror.label: pyrophobic
LanguageData.FireWeakness.label: phoenix
LanguageData.FoamSpray.label: mirelurk
LanguageData.HemogenDrain.label: blood feast
LanguageData.Hemogenic.label: cannibal
LanguageData.Immunity_Strong.label: thick skin
LanguageData.Immunity_SuperStrong.label: vaccinated
LanguageData.Immunity_Weak.label: germophobe
LanguageData.Inbred.label: swamper
LanguageData.Instability_Major.label: metastasis
LanguageData.Instability_Mild.label: cancerous
LanguageData.KillThirst.label: bloody mess
LanguageData.KindInstinct.label: peacemaker
LanguageData.Learning_Fast.label: fast learner
LanguageData.Learning_Slow.label: slow to adapt
LanguageData.Libido_High.label: ladykiller
LanguageData.Libido_Low.label: confirmed bachelor
LanguageData.LongjumpLegs.label: marsupial
LanguageData.LowSleep.label: early bird
LanguageData.MaxTemp_LargeIncrease.label: nuclear hellfire
LanguageData.MaxTemp_SmallDecrease.label: cold blooded
LanguageData.MaxTemp_SmallIncrease.label: scorched wasteland
LanguageData.MeleeDamage_Strong.label: iron fist
LanguageData.MeleeDamage_Weak.label: underweight
LanguageData.MinTemp_LargeDecrease.label: frozen frontier
LanguageData.MinTemp_SmallDecrease.label: warm blooded
LanguageData.MinTemp_SmallIncrease.label: nuclear winter
LanguageData.Mood_Depressive.label: wasteland blues
LanguageData.Mood_Optimist.label: happy camper
LanguageData.Mood_Pessimist.label: doomsday prepper
LanguageData.Mood_Sanguine.label: party boy
LanguageData.MoveSpeed_Quick.label: travel light
LanguageData.MoveSpeed_Slow.label: heavyweight
LanguageData.MoveSpeed_VeryQuick.label: actionboy
LanguageData.NakedSpeed.label: commando
LanguageData.Nearsighted.label: four eyed
LanguageData.Neversleep.label: cyborg
LanguageData.Pain_Extra.label: glass bones
LanguageData.Pain_Reduced.label: toughness
LanguageData.PerfectImmunity.label: iron skin
LanguageData.PiercingSpine.label: deathclaw
LanguageData.PollutionRush.label: ghoulish
LanguageData.PsychicAbility_Deaf.label: blasphemous
LanguageData.PsychicAbility_Dull.label: heretical
LanguageData.PsychicAbility_Enhanced.label: enlightened
LanguageData.PsychicAbility_Extreme.label: chosen
LanguageData.PsychicBonding.label: magnetic personality
LanguageData.Robust.label: stone wall
LanguageData.RobustDigestion.label: lead belly
LanguageData.Sleepy.label: restless
LanguageData.StrongStomach.label: iron stomach
LanguageData.TotalHealing.label: fast healer
LanguageData.ToxicEnvironmentResistance_Partial.label: rad absorption
LanguageData.ToxicEnvironmentResistance_Total.label: rad sponge
LanguageData.ToxResist_Partial.label: rad resistance
LanguageData.ToxResist_Total.label: rad immunity
LanguageData.UVSensitivity_Intense.label: night owl
LanguageData.UVSensitivity_Mild.label: cat eye
LanguageData.VacuumResistance_Partial.label: air pockets
LanguageData.VacuumResistance_Total.label: airtight
LanguageData.VerySleepy.label: sandman
LanguageData.ViolenceDisabled.label: pacifist
LanguageData.VRE_CorpseFeeder.description: Carriers can still draw nourishment from cold, spoiled blood. Wendigo survivors learn to bleed ruined corpses and irradiated remains when nothing living can sate the hunger.
LanguageData.VRE_CorpseFeeder.label: carrion feeder
LanguageData.VRE_ExtremeHemogenDrain.description: Carriers burn through hemogen at a grotesque rate. Their starving, mutation-wracked metabolism strips nutrients faster than ordinary feeding can replace them.
LanguageData.VRE_ExtremeHemogenDrain.label: wasting hunger
LanguageData.WebbedPhalanges.label: aquaboy
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_A.description: Carriers of this gene stumble and trip, moving slowly and awkwardly through the ruins. Their lack of coordination makes escape and pursuit a challenge.
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_A.label: Walking Disaster
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_B.description: Carriers of this gene move at a standard pace, able to keep up with the group but rarely outpace danger. Their reflexes are reliable, if not remarkable.
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_B.label: Under Control
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_C.description: Carriers of this gene are nimble and quick, darting through the wasteland with impressive speed. Their reflexes and coordination are a cut above the rest.
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_C.label: Acrobatic Marvel
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_D.description: Carriers of this gene are legends of movement, outrunning threats and navigating obstacles with acrobatic grace. Their speed is matched only by their finesse.
LanguageData.WestTek_Agility_D.label: Legendary Agility
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_A.description: Carriers of this gene repel others with awkwardness and rough manners, struggling to make friends or influence anyone. Their words fall flat, and their looks do little to help.
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_A.label: Misantrope
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_B.description: Carriers of this gene blend into the crowd, able to hold a conversation and get by, but rarely leaving a lasting impression. Their beauty and speech are unremarkable.
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_B.label: Substitute Teacher
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_C.description: Carriers of this gene charm and persuade with ease, their words and looks opening doors and winning allies. They are the face of any group, and their presence is felt by all.
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_C.label: Movie Star
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_D.description: Carriers of this gene are wasteland celebrities, captivating crowds and swaying opinions with a glance or a word. Their beauty and eloquence are the stuff of legend.
LanguageData.WestTek_Charisma_D.label: Legendary Charisma
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_A.description: Carriers of this gene are fragile, succumbing quickly to wounds, toxins, and pain. The harsh realities of the wasteland take their toll, and survival is a daily struggle.
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_A.label: Do Not Bend
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_B.description: Carriers of this gene endure the wastelandÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s hardships as well as most, surviving wounds and illness with no special advantage or disadvantage. Their bodies are steady, if not exceptional.
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_B.label: Stain Resistant
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_C.description: Carriers of this gene shrug off pain, toxins, and blood loss, surviving injuries that would fell lesser folk. Their stamina and resistance are a testament to their hardy lineage.
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_C.label: Bullet Proof
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_D.description: Carriers of this gene are nearly unstoppable, enduring wounds, poisons, and agony with legendary grit. Their bodies seem built for survival, no matter the odds.
LanguageData.WestTek_Endurance_D.label: Legendary Endurance
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Atlantic.description: The Atlantic embody adaptability Ã¢â‚¬â€ forged by ocean winds and shifting tides. Their blood sings with salt and stubborn endurance.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Atlantic.label: atlantic soul
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Cascadia.description: Children of misty forests and basalt mountains. The Cascadians are unshaken by rain or solitude, ever patient and feral at heart.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Cascadia.label: cascadian wilds
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NatL.description: The Ninety-Nine Tribes carry ancestral echoes Ã¢â‚¬â€ every heart a drumbeat in a chorus of shared memory.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NatL.label: nat'l diversity
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NuevoTexico.description: Dust storms and refinery fumes forged the Texicans Ã¢â‚¬â€ weathered souls fueled by stubborn pride and old oil.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NuevoTexico.label: texico grit
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Numen.description: The Numen are entwined with the land Ã¢â‚¬â€ their spirits a living testament to survival against all odds.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Numen.label: numen roots
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_PureHuman.description: The Pure Humans embody the resilience of unaltered humanity Ã¢â‚¬â€ a steadfast spirit that endures through every trial.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_PureHuman.label: human spirit
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Slanter.description: The Slanters drift between worlds Ã¢â‚¬â€ dreamers and schemers with eyes like broken glass, caught between memory and myth.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Slanter.label: slanter echo
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_SuperMutant.description: The Super MutantsÃ¢â‚¬â„¢ strength is legend Ã¢â‚¬â€ a fusion of pain and pride that outlived their makers.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_SuperMutant.label: super mutant might
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_TwoCalifornia.description: Split between paradise and ruin, the Two Californians live in contradiction Ã¢â‚¬â€ both dreamers and survivors of their own myth.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_TwoCalifornia.label: two-californian duality
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_VaultDweller.description: Raised under steel and silence, the Vault DwellersÃ¢â‚¬â„¢ heritage is order Ã¢â‚¬â€ a longing for structure even in chaos.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_VaultDweller.label: vault heritage
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Wendigo.description: The Wendigo embody hunger made flesh Ã¢â‚¬â€ a spirit of endless wanting that no feast can sate.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Wendigo.label: wendigo hunger
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_A.description: Carriers of this gene struggle with even simple concepts, learning slowly and teaching little. The mysteries of technology and science remain forever out of reach.
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_A.label: Sub Brick
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_B.description: Carriers of this gene grasp new ideas at a normal pace, able to learn and teach as well as most. Their minds are steady, if not brilliant.
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_B.label: Knowledgeable
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_C.description: Carriers of this gene are quick thinkers, mastering skills and sharing knowledge with ease. Their intellect is a valuable asset in the wastes.
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_C.label: Genius
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_D.description: Carriers of this gene are wasteland prodigies, solving problems and teaching others with genius-level insight. Their minds shape the future of civilization.
LanguageData.WestTek_Intelligence_D.label: Legendary Intelligence
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_A.description: Carriers of this gene seem cursed, suffering frequent illness and slow recovery from wounds. Fortune rarely favors them, and danger is a constant companion.
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_A.label: 13 Black Cats
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_B.description: Carriers of this gene experience the usual ups and downs of wasteland life, neither blessed nor cursed. Their health and fortune are as unpredictable as the weather.
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_B.label: Coin Flip
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_C.description: Carriers of this gene are favored by fate, dodging disease and healing quickly from injuries. Good things seem to happen to them more often than not.
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_C.label: 21 Clover Leaf
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_D.description: Carriers of this gene are wasteland legends, immune to misfortune and blessed with miraculous recoveries. Their luck is the envy of all who know them.
LanguageData.WestTek_Luck_D.label: Legendary Luck
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_A.description: Carriers of this gene stumble through the wastes, missing every subtle sound and shadow. Their senses are dulled, making ambushes and hidden dangers a constant threat.
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_A.label: Senile Mole
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_B.description: Carriers of this gene see and hear as well as the next vault dweller, catching most details but sometimes missing the finer points. Their awareness is reliable, if unremarkable.
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_B.label: Alert Coyote
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_C.description: Carriers of this gene have eyes like a hawk and ears tuned to the faintest whisper. They spot threats and opportunities before others, making them invaluable scouts and sharpshooters.
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_C.label: Sniper Hawk
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_D.description: Carriers of this gene are the wastelandÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s living sensors, detecting danger and secrets with supernatural clarity. No ambush or hidden cache escapes their notice.
LanguageData.WestTek_Perception_D.label: Legendary Perception
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_A.description: Carriers of this gene are the definition of frail, struggling to lift even the lightest gear and finding meals a challenge to chew and digest. Their bodies tire quickly, and every burden feels heavier than it should.
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_A.label: Wet Noodle
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_B.description: Carriers of this gene possess the strength of the everyday wastelander, able to carry their own and survive on standard rations. They neither excel nor falter in feats of muscle or digestion.
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_B.label: Average Joe
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_C.description: Carriers of this gene are built for the wastes, hauling heavy loads with ease and devouring even the toughest meals. Their bodies are resilient, and their stamina rarely fails them.
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_C.label: Circus Strongman
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_D.description: Carriers of this gene are legends among survivors, able to lift, carry, and consume with unmatched power. Their strength is the stuff of pre-war myths, and nothing seems too heavy or too tough for them.
LanguageData.WestTek_Strength_D.label: Legendary Strength
LanguageData.WoundHealing_Fast.label: fast metabolism
LanguageData.WoundHealing_Slow.label: hobbler
LanguageData.WoundHealing_SuperFast.label: adamantium skeleton
